hardRules: Every fallback pattern must be classified before it can be treated as acceptable public runtime risk.
migration_required fallback cannot expand to a new scale, new test, new page family, new topic, new personality, new article, or new recommendation surface.
forbidden fallback fails contract when it can become public SEO, graph, recommendation, or claim authority.
local recommendation placeholder cannot become public authority.
Future Universal Assessment Signal Platform surfaces cannot use unclassified fallback.
Fallback additions must include owner, risk, intended replacement, and allowed duration.
Compatibility wrapper fallback cannot be treated as permanent authority.
Frontend fallback cannot become SEO truth.
Frontend fallback cannot become graph truth.
Frontend fallback cannot become recommendation truth.

futureSurfaceGates.blocksWhen: unclassified fallback appears in runtime source or generated public authority artifact

rows.surface: test detail metadata, FAQ, and CTA fallback
rows.desiredOwner: backend scale lookup, landing_surface_v1, answer_surface_v1, and seo.surface.v1
rows.allowedDuration: existing approved test detail runtime only until PR-PRA1B-02 replacement or fail-closed gate
rows.replacementAuthority: scale lookup plus landing_surface_v1, answer_surface_v1, and seo.surface.v1
rows.blocksWhen: Added to new tests, new public surfaces, or new SEO/GEO exposure without backend/CMS authority.
rows.risk: SEO/GEO and claim boundary pollution if new tests inherit frontend metadata, FAQ, or CTA truth.

rows.desiredOwner: CMS topic landing_surface_v1 or topic public API CTA authority
rows.allowedDuration: existing topic detail compatibility only until PR-PRA1B-03 convergence gate
rows.replacementAuthority: CMS topic landing surface and topic public API
rows.blocksWhen: Topic Graph, Topic SEO, or GEO expansion depends on frontend CTA fallback.
rows.risk: Topic expansion can expose frontend-invented CTA authority.

rows.surface: llms and llms-full topic fallback exposure
rows.desiredOwner: backend/CMS topic discoverability and exposure authority
rows.allowedDuration: bounded compatibility fixture only until PR-PRA1B-03 topic/llms convergence
rows.replacementAuthority: CMS topic exposure state plus backend discoverability eligibility
rows.blocksWhen: llms or llms-full topic exposure widens without fixture and backend/CMS authority.
rows.risk: AI-search exposure can widen before topic authority, evidence, or claim boundaries are ready.

rows.desiredOwner: CMS personality projection and public surface bundle
rows.allowedDuration: noindex/schema-suppressed emergency fallback only until PR-PRA1B-04 projection gate
rows.replacementAuthority: CMS personality projection and public gateway surface
rows.blocksWhen: Fallback projection is used for indexable schema, graph authority, recommendation authority, or career claims.
rows.risk: Personality fallback can be mistaken for CMS personality, graph, career, or recommendation authority.

rows.currentOwner: frontend article page fallback schema builder
rows.desiredOwner: CMS article SEO/answer surface or visible-content deterministic Article JSON-LD
rows.allowedDuration: existing article compatibility bridge only until PR-PRA1B-04 JSON-LD authority gate
rows.replacementAuthority: CMS article SEO, answer surface, and visible article content
rows.blocksWhen: New article/GEO expansion relies on frontend-generated Article schema authority.
rows.risk: Frontend schema fallback can become hidden SEO/GEO authority if not tied to CMS or visible content.

rows.desiredOwner: backend sitemap-source where backend authority exists, with fixtures for retained static compatibility paths
rows.allowedDuration: retained only for existing governed sitemap generation until backend sitemap-source coverage is complete
rows.replacementAuthority: backend sitemap-source and explicit compatibility fixtures
rows.blocksWhen: Static sitemap additions bypass backend indexability and exposure fixtures.
rows.risk: Static sitemap additions can widen public discoverability outside backend/CMS truth.

rows.desiredOwner: backend recommendation snapshot or future governed recommendation runtime
rows.allowedDuration: unused placeholder only; never public authority
rows.replacementAuthority: backend governed recommendation snapshot or future approved runtime
rows.blocksWhen: Local ranking is used as public recommendation, graph, SEO, CTA, or claim authority.
rows.risk: Frontend-local ranking would misrepresent placeholder logic as recommendation authority.

rows.allowedDuration: documentation and internal candidate examples only; never public runtime authority
rows.blocksWhen: Frontend creates public graph edges or schema graph authority.
rows.risk: Frontend-created edges would pollute public graph and recommendation semantics.

rows.desiredOwner: CMS landing surface for editorial truth
rows.allowedDuration: product shell compatibility only while not used as SEO, graph, or recommendation authority
rows.replacementAuthority: CMS landing surface and page blocks
rows.blocksWhen: Product shell filtering or canonical href normalization is treated as SEO, graph, recommendation, editorial, or public claim truth.
rows.risk: Homepage shell filtering can be misread as editorial/discoverability authority if reclassified.

rows.currentOwner: frontend public test catalog compatibility seed
rows.desiredOwner: backend scale catalog and scale lookup
rows.allowedDuration: existing test catalog compatibility only; no new scale or test exposure
rows.blocksWhen: New tests or scales are exposed through frontend seed fallback.
rows.risk: Future tests can appear in public runtime without backend scale authority.
